name: Al Zabir
desc: Working on Flutter app development projects, currently learning Python & AI/ML. Looking to collaborate on open source & real world apps.
aboutDesc: Hi, I’m Al Zabir. I am a Flutter developer and web designer focused on building simple, clean, and useful mobile apps, websites, and on-device applications. I work with Flutter, Python, and AI/ML. I enjoy turning ideas into real, working applications through code and practical implementation.

projects.project-desc: An intelligent screenshot management app that automatically detects captures, extracts text using offline OCR, and categorizes them with advanced search, voice notes, and recovery options.

A retro-style smart alarm clock, power nap timer, and sleep cycle alarm designed to defeat sleep inertia and wake up your brain instantly through fun mini-games. Includes a personal dream diary and sleep coaching guides.

A simple, beautiful, and reliable medication reminder app designed to help you stay on track with your Medicine . Set custom schedules, add dose instructions (e.g. before/after meal), and track your progress securely on-device.
A modern, production-ready Flutter Starter Kit designed to accelerate app development with clean architecture, reusable components, and scalable structure.

services.title: Flutter App Development
services.desc: Building modern, high performance cross-platform mobile applications for Android & iOS with clean architecture and scalable code.

services.title: Frontend Development
services.desc: Developing clean, interactive, and responsive web applications using modern web technologies and frameworks.

services.title: UI/UX Design (Figma)
services.desc: Designing sleek, modern, and user-friendly mobile and web interface prototypes using Figma.
